creator: burak.sn@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Kristof Provost from comment #3)

"It's a very odd place for a panic, in the sense that nothing that's changed in the past several years should affect that, and it's also a relatively straightforward call. It really shouldn't be panicking there."

Hi,
Yes you are right. I have recognized that one of my services get trouble and it tried to create 10 thousands redis connection to my redis server. After corrected this issue and reloaded my FreeBSD Captive Portal gw with nearly 100  clients there is no problem like panic. If any pf related panic occurs i wlil inform you  Thanks.
